title: container-encrypted-volume backend manifest
description: Declares a storage backend: how data is encrypted on disk, what the runtime must grant, and which optional capabilities it supports.

name.description: Backend identifier; must match its directory name and the CEV_BACKEND value.

requires.description: Container runtime flags the backend needs (informational + checked by preflight). e.g. ["--privileged"] or granular --cap-add/--device/--security-opt.

capabilities.description: Honest declaration of optional features. A backend MUST report false rather than silently degrade.

rotateWithoutReencrypt.description: true if `rotate` swaps the unlock key without re-encrypting bulk data (e.g. LUKS key-slots).

separableHeaderBackup.description: true if `header-backup` can emit recovery metadata separable from the bulk data (e.g. LUKS header).

growInPlace.description: true if `grow` can expand capacity of an existing container in place.
